subject: fix(graph): remove duplicate toolbar comment, scope Escape handler to open state
body:
Two cleanup fixes found during review:

1. Removed duplicate comment block in App.tsx toolbar section — the original
   was left in when the new one was added during graph settings implementation.

2. GraphSettingsPopover's useEscapeKey now only fires when open=true. Previously
   it registered a global keydown listener unconditionally, which could interfere
   with other modals' Escape handlers when the popover was closed.

Tags: graph, cleanup, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: graph-styling
Semver: patch

title: remove duplicate toolbar comment, scope Escape handler to open state
